calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: rung-6 natural-commit-occupancy-release de-commit falsifier + natural-commit LATCH-HOLD amend (460i-successor; gate-3 sustained-hold redesign)
items.note: V3-EXQ-460j SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-460i. The rung-6 de-commit falsifier re-run with the natural-commit LATCH-HOLD substrate amend (use_natural_commit_latch_hold, landed today via /implement-substrate; agent.py + config.py) ARMED in ALL arms so the ARM_LEVER_OFF baseline SUSTAINS a natural-commit beta latch BY CONSTRUCTION, plus the gate-3 redesign the user-adjudicated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-460i_2026-06-21 (Option B) prescribed. 460i fired ZERO releases + self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue at gate 3: the lever was correctly ARMED but the 460h sustained ~2400-step monolithic natural-commit hold did not reproduce -- the active SD-034 de-commit control-plane fragmented the latch to ~1-tick blips EVEN WITH THE LEVER OFF, and gate-3's mean_beta_elevated_steps proxy was BLIND to sustained-vs-fragmented. The latch-hold re-asserts the natural-commit-armed beta latch against the churn (YIELDS to the closure de-commit / MECH-091 threat / the rung-6 release, so the MECH-446 occupancy-drop DV stays measurable). NEW readiness gate 3 (REDESIGN): ARM_LEVER_OFF mean per-commit hold length total_beta_elevated/max(1,beta_release_events) >= SUSTAINED_HOLD_MEAN_FLOOR (5.0; 460i OFF was ~1.0) on >=2/3 guard seeds CERTIFIES the sustained regime is present (+ max_consecutive_beta_run + ncl_hold_reassert_total reported) BEFORE gate 4 (lever fired ncur_n_releases_total>0 + >= LEVER_OCC_DROP_FRAC occupancy drop vs OFF on ARM_GAP_SCALED) + the CO_OCCURRENCE DV. 4 eval arms (one trained substrate/seed, lever toggled at eval via clone; hold armed in all): ARM_LEVER_OFF (sustained reference) / ARM_GAP_SCALED (graded urgency, PRIMARY) / ARM_FLAT_RATE (D1 fixed-refractory control) / ARM_ACTION_EXTENT (Jin). Seven readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue when unmet (NEVER a false weakens; incl the new sustained-hold gate). PASS = MECH-445 commit-intent + MECH-446 within-arm occupancy-drop co-occur on >=2/3 seeds (dissolves the 460h disjoint-certifier problem). claim_ids=[MECH-446 scored, MECH-445 commit-intent precondition]; MECH-446/445 stay candidate/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate (PROMOTES NOTHING; governance applies). Do NOT re-author 460d/e/f/g/h/i. Pinned ree-cloud-2 (cloud, not the Mac) per the duration/affinity lesson; 460-lineage runs on cloud. validate_experiments --strict PASS; dry-run smoke PASS (end-to-end, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at the new gate-3 at toy budget as designed, no manifest written). Working-tree-vs-HEAD audit (WT==HEAD) + post-commit dropped-file check applied per Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race).

items.title: SD-049 Phase-2 4-arm substrate-gradient validation: measurement re-issue of V3-EXQ-693 porting the working 514t info-tag WL-scoring harness so the R3 non-vacuity guard fires; supersedes V3-EXQ-693
items.note: failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-693_2026-06-20 (confirmed): 693 self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue/non_vacuity_unmet with R3 (WL-channel-fireable) the sole unmet guard (n_scored_wl_steps_total=0 all 4 arms/3 seeds) = INSTRUMENTATION gap (693 forked from 514l pre-514n; stale WL-scoring harness), NOT a substrate ceiling/falsification. 693a ports the 514t info-tag WL read (liking target + L2 bind from info['sd049_consumed_type_tag_this_tick'] captured pre-clear; WL scoring gated on a genuine consumption event); 4-arm gradient + identity probe + ANOVA + R1/R2/R3 self-route guards unchanged; R1 contact counter keeps benefit-OR-consumed gate so ARM_0 (SD-049 OFF) not regressed. Dry-run smoke: WL scored 9 (693=0), probe 0.733/n=347, ANOVA 55.3, pc_sep 1.0. WATCH (carried from autopsy S5, gated behind R3 in 693): C_GR margin lift was near-zero (ARM_2-ARM_0=0.0067; -0.0087 ARM_3) -> a margin-near-zero outcome post-WL-fix is a likely conversion-side substrate_ceiling/substrate_conditional re-route (via /failure-autopsy), NOT a falsification.

items.title: ARC-062/MECH-309 modulatory-bias monomodal-collapse retest on the implemented modulatory/rule channel (569i top-k; route-range P0 gate); supersedes 654g
items.note: Substrate-landing RETEST of substrate_ceiling MECH-309+ARC-062 on the now-implemented modulatory-bias/rule-apprehension channel; supersedes V3-EXQ-654g (non_contributory 2026-06-19). Single-var ARM_OFF (collapsed rule_state) vs ARM_ON (matured differentiated crf_source) on the 569i top-k shortlist conversion stack; PRIMARY DV committed-class entropy vs ARM_OFF AND proposer first-action dist. ENTANGLEMENT: residual ceiling IS the shared MECH-439 F-dominance conversion ceiling, MID-BUILD (MECH-448 lever landed 2026-06-20; falsifier V3-EXQ-689d queued); 695 keeps ALL 689-family levers OFF on every arm, distinct from 689d, priority<689-cluster so the build runs first (sequence after 689d per agent caveat). SAME-STATISTIC P0 gate (R5 ARM_ON modulatory_channel_route_range>floor, the route-range stat the conversion authority routes on; +R1 class-axis/R2 e2-div/R3 matured pool/R4 propagation) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue; three branches, no weakens: PASS(supports)/readiness-holds-C2-fail(F-dominance ceiling, /implement-substrate)/readiness-fail(re-queue). Queued via /governance ceiling-audit may-have-lifted routing 2026-06-20.

items.title: SD-033b/MECH-263 OFC-analog outcome-prediction substrate-ceiling retest (3-arm trained vs OFF vs matched-noise; route-range P0 gate)
items.note: Substrate-landing retest of SD-033b+MECH-263 substrate_ceiling: does the trained OFC-analog specific-outcome-prediction channel lift the previously-ceiling'd behavioural devaluation+task-role-discrimination metric strictly above OFF + a frozen-head matched-noise control? 3-arm (ARM_0_OFF/ARM_1_ON/ARM_2_MATCHED_NOISE) x 3-seed, phased P0->P1(frozen-encoder head)->P2. ENTANGLEMENT: per substrate_queue f_dominance_conversion_ceiling the OFC channel is channel 1 and F-dominance channel 2 of an active conversion ceiling mid-build (MECH-448 lever; falsifier V3-EXQ-689d queued); a non-PASS most likely corroborates the conversion ceiling, NOT refutes OFC. SAME-STATISTIC P0 gate: self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue/non_contributory (NEVER a SD-033b/MECH-263 weakens) if the trained-head bias cross-candidate RANGE is below the 0.05 floor (the stat the load-bearing DVs route on); a readiness-met C1-fail records devalued-state range + diagnostic live-E3 F-test for /failure-autopsy adjudication. priority<689-cluster. Queued via /governance ceiling-audit may-have-lifted routing 2026-06-20.

items.title: ARC-013 residue-separability falsifier (residue vs salience+uncertainty)
items.note: Offline re-ranking separability test: is residue's per-candidate E3 decision influence reducible to salience(z_world visitation-novelty)+uncertainty(_running_variance)? PASS=separable primitive (Q-079 HA2 corroboration); FAIL=reducible. Replaces the role Q-079/DLIF notes mis-attributed to V3-EXQ-587 (harm-gradient geometry, ran 2026-05-19 FAIL/non_contributory, reviewed). Off the v3 strict green-board (low priority).
